author: y4rr
content: Local plainact + ensemble shipped. Plainact: added plainact_local tap to GPU profiler (extra matmul per layer for y_full @ down_proj), captured 1.5M-token K=4 trace with plainact target, trained pw=3 BCE F1=0.548 (sparser positives 17% vs 32%). Best operating point: t=-5 → 73% density, cos 0.943, argmax ✓. NEW pareto data point but slightly worse than raw-act top_k=18 (69%, 0.948). Ensemble OR(pw3+pw5+mwbce) wired via add_shadow_llm_extra — at t=-2.5 gives 86%/0.976/✓ but no Pareto win at meaningful density. Final pareto unchanged: pw=3 BCE t=-2.5 still best at 57% MLP savings + argmax preserved (cos 0.882). The proper plainact needs a real LM-head CE backward pass through bf16 kernels — weeks of engineering. 85 lib tests pass.
